blockers: P0: Add BREVO_SMTP_LOGIN + BREVO_SMTP_KEY, then: python3 AUTOMATIONS/email_sender.py --outreach AUTOMATIONS/leads/openclaw/outreach_queue.csv --provider brevo --max-sends 39
P1: Apollo.io 50 free lookups → priority: Pikeville KY + Hazard KY (Eastern KY debut, high F-grade) + Elizabethtown KY
P2: Surge upgrade $13/mo — frozen at 472, GH Pages primary channel

cycle_9_results.observation: SE/Midwest pivot yields 72% F-grade vs 5% West Coast. GH Pages now dominant deploy channel — 831 sites in single batch push. Website-scraping enricher confirmed wrong tool for F-grade segment (businesses without websites have no email to scrape). Apollo.io needed.
cycle_9_results.surge_blocker: Student plan frozen; 472 refresh-eligible domains only
cycle_9_results.ghpages_breakthrough: 831 sites committed + pushed in one cycle — 1,094 total live

cycle_4_results.surge_blocker: Student plan domain limit exhausted after 402 deployed domains

cycle_5_results.surge_blocker: Student plan blocks new subdomains not previously registered to account

cycle_6_results.surge_blocker: Student plan blocks NEW subdomains; refreshes of existing domains succeed (30 Denver sites deployed)
cycle_6_results.deploy_discovery: Confirmed: only previously-registered surge subdomains can be refreshed. New domains require Plus or new account.

cycle_6_improvements: Discovered 139 new leads across 8 new cities (36 total cities covered)
Built 235 new HTML preview sites (1,634 total across all cycles)
Deployed 30 surge refreshes on Denver sites (proving refresh path works)
Outreach queue grew from 569 to 704 emails (+135)
Identified 445 surge-live sites vs 1,189 HTML-only (deploy service upgrade unlocks all)
Confirmed surge deploy root cause: Student plan restricts NEW subdomains, not refresh of existing ones
Next step: Netlify CLI deploy as replacement — free tier, 300 sites, no domain restriction

cycle_7_results.ghpages_breakthrough: Created fnsmdehip/openclaw-previews repo, deployed 100 sites, enabled GitHub Pages
cycle_7_results.surge_blocker: Student plan still blocks new surge subdomains; refresh of existing 472 domains still works

cycle_8_results.observation: West Coast/Mountain cities run higher A-grade (polished web presence). SE US and Midwest still best F-grade source.
cycle_8_results.new_niche_focus: Roofing + tree service = higher ticket, same pipeline
cycle_8_results.surge_blocker: Student plan still blocks new subdomains; 472 refresh-eligible
cycle_8_results.ghpages_breakthrough: 163 new sites pushed to fnsmdehip/openclaw-previews (263 total live)

cycle_10_results.observation: Deep South pivot confirmed: Meridian MS 100%, Columbia SC 91%, Montgomery AL 79%, Jackson MS 75% F-grade. GH Pages at 1,199 live sites. Email enricher 0% on F-grade segment — Apollo.io required.

cycle_11_results.observation: Deep South Cycle 11 delivers as expected. Dothan AL leads at 94.4% F-grade, Natchez MS 87%, Vicksburg MS 86.4%. 1,398 total GH Pages sites live. Email enricher still 0% on F-grade segment — Apollo.io remains the unlock. 1,632 outreach emails ready to send when email service connected. Next: expand to Shreveport LA / Tupelo MS / Valdosta GA for continued Deep South sweep.

cycle_12_results.observation: Mid-size cities (100K+ pop) yielded only 9.6% F-grade vs 80%+ from micro-cities. National chain contamination (Ulta, KBB, GAF) inflating F-count. Bonus batch of 8 micro-cities recovered yield. Recommend targeting only pop<50K cities going forward. Domain blacklist needed for chains/directories.
cycle_12_results.intelligence: City size <50K = sweet spot. City size >100K = wrong target segment.

cycle_13_results.observation: Towing confirmed as #1 F-grade niche: ~95% across all micro-cities. Micro-city targeting (<20K pop) delivers 75-100% F-grade vs 8-15% for major metros. 1,690 GH Pages live. 358 file:// URLs converted to live github.io URLs. Email dispatch remains the single blocker.

cycle_14_results.new_region_discovery: Tennessee + Kentucky: Elizabethtown KY plumber 100% F-grade, Dyersburg TN auto repair 92% F-grade, Hopkinsville KY plumber 100% F-grade. TN/KY = new high-yield frontier.
cycle_14_results.niche_expansion: Added junk removal, roofing, landscaping, pest control to discovery — Waynesboro MS landscaping 100% F-grade
cycle_14_results.observation: +471 leads in one cycle, discovering TN/KY as new frontier with 80-100% F-grade. Waynesboro MS landscaping and Columbia MS landscaping both 100% F-grade. 263 new live GH Pages sites. 780 file:// URL debt resolved — now all 1,948 outreach entries have live preview URLs. Email dispatch remains only bottleneck.

cycle_15_results.observation: KY micro-cities confirm towing+handyman = 100% F-grade. Pikeville KY towing 11/11, Glasgow KY towing 7/7, Morehead KY handyman 11/11. Lawrenceburg TN 90%+ across niches. AR adds new frontier. GH Pages now at 2,104 live sites. Email bottleneck unchanged — 36 ready, 2,063 need Apollo.io enrichment.

cycle_16_results.observation: AR expansion confirms pattern: Jonesboro AR 92% F-grade handyman, Fort Smith AR 80% handyman. Bolivar TN 87% handyman. Paris TN handyman 100%. Total GH Pages now 2,233. Email dispatch remains only blocker — 36 ready with live GH Pages URLs. 2,194 need Apollo.io enrichment.

cycle_18_results.observation: Cycle 18 delivers 172 leads across KY+AR frontier. 16 F/D grade (9%). 17 new GH Pages sites pushed. file:// URL debt cleared (62 fixed). 39 outreach emails ready when Brevo SMTP connected.

cycle_19_results.observation: Cycle 19 completes KY 270 area code sweep + AR 870 expansion + TN 423 opening. 191 new leads, 19 F/D grade (10%). 80 new GH Pages pushed. Pipeline at 2313 outreach entries, 39 ready to send. Single blocker: Brevo SMTP credentials.

cycle_20_results.observation: Cycle 20: Tri-Cities TN entry (Kingsport/Johnson City) + KY 270 cluster completion + AR Pine Bluff + HVAC niche debut. 202 new leads, 14 F/D (7%). 29 new GH Pages pushed. Pipeline at 2342 outreach entries, 39 ready to send. Next: Central KY frontier + Appalachian corridor (VA/WV) = new high-F-grade territory.

cycle_21_results.observation: Cycle 21: KY Central Frontier + TN SE + AR I-40 + FIRST WV coverage (Bluefield/Beckley) + Eastern KY Appalachian corridor (Pikeville/Hazard). 309 new leads, 218 F/D (71%). 90 new GH Pages pushed. Pipeline at 2432 outreach entries, 39 ready to send. WV F-grade rate: 90%, Eastern KY F-grade rate: 85%.
